name: Cedar Block Piru
description: The Cedar Block Piru is a Blood/Piru set formed around 1980 on the west side of Compton, named after Cedar Street. Active in St. Louis, Newark, Norfolk, and Richmond. Connected to rapper The Game, who joined in high school despite his parents being Crips. In December 1992, Cedar Block Piru members aided by two Fort Lewis soldiers murdered Allen King and his three children, believing King had reported their drug house.
